_comment: DFLASH ITL warmup for Qwen3.5-4B. test_spec_size_list sweeps --speculative-dflash-verify-step (NOT --speculative-num-steps). Valid range: 0 <= verify_step < block_size (16). Output JSONL field spec_size = verify_step.
_seqlen_note: Cover your production input token distribution. itl_cost trend depends strongly on seqlen.

_verify_step_note: verify_step=7 -> target verify len=8 tokens per spec cycle. Must satisfy 0 <= verify_step < block_size (16).
